name: should filter by active rosters
description: Test case for should filter by active rosters
expected_query: with "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as recs_from_plays, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true AND td = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rec_tds_from_plays, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays, SUM(CASE WHEN dot >= 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deep_trg_from_plays, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN dot >= 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 0 END as deep_trg_pct_from_plays, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(SUM(dot)::decimal / SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS decimal) ELSE 0 END as air_yds_per_trg_from_plays, SUM(dot) as air_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", CASE WHEN SUM(nfl_plays.dot) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0), 2) ELSE 0 END as air_yds_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) group by "pg"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."recs_from_plays" AS "recs_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_tds_from_plays" AS "rec_tds_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."deep_trg_from_plays" AS "deep_trg_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."deep_trg_pct_from_plays" AS "deep_trg_pct_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."air_yds_per_trg_from_plays" AS "air_yds_per_trg_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."air_yds_from_plays" AS "air_yds_from_plays_0", "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."air_yds_share_from_plays" AS "air_yds_share_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933" on "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') and CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END = 'active_roster' group by player.fname, player.lname, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."recs_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_tds_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."deep_trg_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."deep_trg_pct_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."air_yds_per_trg_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."air_yds_from_plays", "t8ba8738c2535f236ee2a1061c5fe4933"."air_yds_share_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 12 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
